# llms.txt for LOJJ
#
# This file provides guidance for LLM-based tools that may crawl public pages.
# It is not a security boundary; robots.txt remains the primary crawler control.
#
# Learn more: https://llmstxt.org/

User-agent: *
Allow: /

Preferred-Content: https://www.lojj.io/

Summary: LOJJ is a hotel operations platform for reducing front desk calls with guest FAQ automation and task tracking across shifts (housekeeping and work orders included).
